heading: Thirty years or more: regular enlisted members
label: 9317 Thirty years or more: regular enlisted members
text: A regular enlisted member of the Air Force or the Space Force who has at least 30 years of service computed under shall be retired upon his request.section 9325 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)891710:947 (less proviso).10:947a (less last 11 words).(1st 35 words), .Mar. 2, 1907, ch. 2515, § 134 Stat. 1217(less 43d through 53d words); restated (less 43d through 53d words), .Feb. 14, 1885, ch. 67Sept. 30, 1890, ch. 112526 Stat. 504The word “regular” is inserted to conform to an opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Army (JAGA 1953/2301, 23 Mar. 1953). The words “upon his request” are substituted for the words “upon making application to the President”, in 10:947, and “by application to the President”, in 10:947a. The words “either as a private or non-commissioned officer, or both”, in 10:947a, are omitted as surplusage. The words “shall be retired” are substituted for the words “be placed upon the retired list”, in 10:947, and “be placed on the retired list heretofore created”, in 10:947a. The words “computed under ” are inserted for clarity. The 21 words before the proviso and the proviso of the Act of , as restated, are not contained in 10:947a. They are also omitted from the revised section, since the proviso is executed and the 21 words before the proviso are omitted as covered by formula E of .section 8925 of this titlesection 8991 of this titleFebruary 14, 1885
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 9317 was renumbered .section 9417 of this title

Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section and substituted “section 9325” for “section 8925”.Pub. L. 115–232section 8917 of this title
